title: erigeron coronarius
intro: Erigeron coronarius is a perennial plant species, commonly known as the Alpine Fleabane, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating various health conditions. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Alpine Fleabane can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
